reconciliations.reason: ASC-0001 was created during bootstrap while proposed, then accepted and closed with later evidence; preserve runtime history and reconcile the exact known drift.

The end-user ask surface was initially drafted under ASC-0105, but ASC-0105 was already assigned to the AIOS DNA canonical spec. The active contract is ASC-0109; preserve the bad dispatch event as historical drift.
The transient ASC-0105 end-user surface dispatch was superseded before execution because ASC-0105 was already assigned. ASC-0109 is the executable dispatch.

MemoryOS continuous health was initially drafted with ASC-0171 but collided with the accepted Hive permissioned dangerous-provider contract. The MemoryOS health contract was renumbered to ASC-0175 and closed with evidence; preserve the stale ASC-0171 dispatch event as historical ID-collision drift.

ASC-0174 was initially created while proposed, then accepted and closed under the active continuous-goal directive after Hive debate evidence landed. Preserve the proposed creation event and reconcile the exact historical status drift after closeout.
